result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make empathy and cooperation the default mode of every human society—so that people naturally prioritize the well‑being of others, share resources freely, and work together to solve the big challenges like climate change, poverty, and injustice. Imagine a world where the instinct to help, rather than to compete or dominate, guides our decisions, policies, and daily interactions. That single shift could ripple outward, making everything else—peace, sustainability, equitable health care, education—much easier to achieve.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make empathy and cooperation the default mode of every human society—so that people naturally prioritize the well‑being of others, share resources freely, and work together to solve the big challenges like climate change, poverty, and injustice. Imagine a world where the instinct to help, rather than to compete or dominate, guides our decisions, policies, and daily interactions. That single shift could ripple outward, making everything else—peace, sustainability, equitable health care, education—much easier to achieve.
